prompt: A cinematic low-angle 35mm fashion editorial photograph of a confident male model standing full-body in the center of a futuristic concrete-and-glass corridor. He poses with both hands in his front jean pockets, legs apart in a powerful stance, looking down toward the camera. He wears a pale mint green vertical-striped button-down shirt with ornate embroidered floral designs across both chest areas, dark blue denim jeans, and polished brown leather boots. The setting is a tall brutalist architectural passage with raw gray concrete walls, large dark reflective glass panels on both sides, a rectangular skylight overhead, and a series of nested geometric doorway frames receding into the distance. Add exactly 8 prominent cyan-blue neon light strips: 2 long diagonal vertical strips on the near left and right walls, 2 angular frame outlines in the mid-ground, and 4 thinner reflected/receding strips visible through the glass and corridor depth. Use a highly polished stone floor with subtle reflections, symmetrical one-point perspective, dramatic vertical lines, cool teal-blue color grading, soft dust particles floating in the air, and bright daylight from the skylight. Shot from floor level with a wide-angle lens, exaggerated perspective, editorial fashion lighting, crisp realistic textures, shallow atmospheric haze, high contrast, no text, no logos, no watermark.
